testcase.name: testDetailViewIncrementsCount
testcase.system-out:
16:38:35.714 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.blog.controller.ArticleControllerTest]: ArticleControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 16:38:35.811 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.blog.BlogApplication for test class com.example.blog.controller.ArticleControllerTest 16:38:35.861 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

[THYMELEAF] * "StandardConversionService": org.thymeleaf.spring6.expression.SpringStandardConversionService@44e79e9e [THYMELEAF] * Dialect [2 of 2]: SpringSecurity
